data.title: CryptoQuant CEO Suggests Strategy May Be Oversold
data.description: According to BlockBeats, Ki Young Ju, the founder and CEO of CryptoQuant, shared on social media that Strategy (MSTR) appears to be in an oversold state. This assessment is based on the quantity of Bitcoin it holds and its historical premium levels.

data.title: Cosmos Hub Initiates ATOM Token Economics Research Program
data.description:
According to ChainCatcher, Cosmos Hub has officially launched a research program focused on the economics of the ATOM token. The initiative aims to design a sustainable, revenue-based token economic model that underscores ATOM's central role within the Cosmos ecosystem.

The research will unfold in five stages: proposal requests, selection of research teams, information gathering, analysis of research findings, and governance voting. The study will concentrate on foundational models of token economics based on actual revenue, rather than delving directly into specific mechanisms or flywheel designs. Cosmos Labs has stated that this model will move away from the limitations of circular token economic systems, instead driving ATOM's long-term growth through sustainable revenue generated by enterprise adoption of the Cosmos technology stack.

The community is expected to play a crucial role throughout the process, including participating in the selection of research teams, providing feedback, and engaging in the final on-chain voting. Cosmos Labs has described this initiative as potentially one of the most significant governance proposals in the history of Cosmos.

data.title: Calvin Ayre linked to Wirecard collapse on German public TV
data.description:
German public news program Tagesschau has tied long time BSV proponent Calvin Ayre to the collapse of Wirecard.
source: https://protos.com/calvin-ayre-linked-to-wirecard-collapse-on-german-public-tv/

data.title: Franklin Templeton filed a prospectus with the SEC for the Solana spot ETF, with a fee rate of 0.19%.
data.description: According to SolanaFloor, Franklin Templeton has filed a prospectus with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) for its Solana spot ETF, with a fee rate of 0.19%, the lowest among Solana spot ETFs, and a fee waiver for the first $5 billion in assets under management (AUM). The ETF is expected to launch today.

data.title: Polygon Surges as Small Transactions Exceed 500,000 in November
data.description:
Polygon's small transactions see a 23% rise in November, hitting 500,000 as it becomes a crypto payment mainstay.
source: https://coincu.com/news/polygon-small-transactions-500000-november/

data.title: US Lawmakers Push 10-Year Ban on Chinese Chipmaking Equipment for CHIPS Recipients
data.description:

data.title: H100 Appoints New Marketing and Communications Manager
data.description: According to Foresight News, Nordic Bitcoin treasury company H100 has announced the appointment of Elise Nolsen as its new Marketing and Communications Manager. Elise brings strategic marketing and sales experience from her previous role at Norwegian SaaS unicorn company Meltwater and has also worked with agencies in Norway.

data.title: Bank of Russia amends rules to allow crypto investments through mutual funds
data.description:
Russia’s central bank is lifting restrictions on crypto investments via mutual funds by amending regulations governing their activities.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/bank-russia-amends-rules-crypto-mutual-funds/

data.description:

data.title: Thailand imposes a 0% capital gains tax on Bitcoin traded through its national exchange.
data.description: The Bitcoin Historian posted on the X platform that Thailand currently imposes a 0% capital gains tax on Bitcoin traded through the national exchange.

data.title: Significant Transfer of TON Tokens to Elector Contract
data.description: According to ChainCatcher, data from Arkham reveals that at 18:22, a total of 2,001,158.284 TON tokens, valued at approximately $3,121,806.92, were transferred from an anonymous address beginning with Uf_rBQT to TON's Elector Contract.

data.title: Thailand Implements 0% Capital Gains Tax on Bitcoin Transactions
data.description: According to Odaily, The Bitcoin Historian shared on the X platform that Thailand currently imposes a 0% capital gains tax on Bitcoin traded through the national exchange.

data.description:

data.title: The Bull And Bear Scenario For XRP That Could Play Out In November
data.description:
After a few months of ups and downs, the XRP price had fallen below $2 this month for the first time in seven months, breaking down toward its yearly support of $1. 79. While there has been some recovery recently, the momentum remains low, and the chances of a sustained recovery decline with each new dip. As the altcoin continues to struggle, a market analyst has outlined the two major directions that the price could go in, given the bull and bear scenarios
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/analysis/xrp/bull-anbear-scenario-for-xrp/

data.title: Bitplanet Increases Bitcoin Holdings with Recent Purchase
data.description: According to BlockBeats, South Korean publicly traded company Bitplanet (049470.KQ) has acquired an additional 28.5 bitcoins. This purchase brings the company's total bitcoin holdings to 228.5 BTC, as disclosed by BTCtreasuries.

data.title: Bitwise launches BWOW after Dogecoin fans demand an ETF
data.description:
Bitwise launches the BWOW Dogecoin ETF on NYSE Arca, giving investors regulated DOGE exposure as demand and competing ETF filings grow.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/bitwise-launches-bwow-after-demand-of-etf/
